customCommands.name: deploy
customCommands.command: TS=$(date -u +%Y%m%d%H%M%S) && find . -path './.agents' -prune -o \( -name '*.html' -o -name 'js/version.js' \) -print | xargs sed -i "s/[0-9]\{14\}/$TS/g" && git add -A && git commit -m "deploy v$TS" && git push
customCommands.description: Bump version timestamp, commit, and push to deploy
